concerns.text: FR-045 (Benjamini‑Hochberg FDR ≤ 0.05 for edge inclusion) has no corresponding task implementing the multiple‑testing correction step.
FR-023 (correlation‑threshold sensitivity analysis and generation of `threshold_sensitivity_<species>.tsv`) is not covered by any task; no task creates the sensitivity analysis output.
FR-030 (schema validation of `threshold_sensitivity_<species>.tsv`) lacks a dedicated task that performs this validation.
FR-032 (balanced negative‑sampling strategy for evaluation) is not represented by any task; there is no task that generates the required negative set.
FR-035 (recording exact CLI invocation, software versions, and random seed in `pipeline.log`) is missing a task that explicitly captures and logs this information.
